root_cause.text: The `sdp_parse_fmtp_config_h264` function fails to check if the `value` string is empty before accessing its last character using `value[strlen(value) - 1]`, leading to an out-of-bounds access at index -1.
root_cause.evidence: The patch adds a null character check (`*value == 0`) before evaluating `value[strlen(value) - 1] == ','` to prevent the out-of-bounds access when processing an empty `sprop-parameter-sets` value.

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: The `sdp_parse_fmtp_config_h264` function fails to check if the `value` string is empty before accessing its last character using `value[strlen(value) - 1]`, leading to an out-of-bounds access at index -1.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The patch adds a null character check (`*value == 0`) before evaluating `value[strlen(value) - 1] == ','` to prevent the out-of-bounds access when processing an empty `sprop-parameter-sets` value.

intent_record.intent_summary: Add boundary guard to prevent out-of-bounds read on empty sprop-parameter-sets values.
intent_record.what: Added an empty string check to the value pointer before checking its last character.
intent_record.how: Prevents an out-of-bounds memory read that would occur if strlen(value) evaluates to 0, resulting in a -1 index.

grouping_result.intent: Add boundary guard to prevent out-of-bounds read on empty sprop-parameter-sets values.

relevance_review.reason: The group directly addresses the vulnerability by adding a boundary guard to prevent the out-of-bounds read on empty values, which matches the described root cause.

candidates.rationale: This line accesses value[strlen(value) - 1] without checking if 'value' is empty, directly matching the described root cause for the out-of-bounds access.

vuln_statements.explanation: This statement accesses the last character of 'value' using strlen(value) - 1 without first checking if 'value' is empty, leading to an out-of-bounds read at index -1.

diff --git a/libavformat/rtpdec_h264.c b/libavformat/rtpdec_h264.c
index b399be423e..e707d03b87 100644
--- a/libavformat/rtpdec_h264.c

@@ -166,6 +166,10 @@ static int sdp_parse_fmtp_con
bic_trace_step.reason: The commit introduces the vulnerable logic `if (value[strlen(value) - 1] == ',')` without checking if the `value` string is empty, which can lead to an out-of-bounds access at index -1. Therefore, this is the bug-introducing commit.
